title: Finding a Needle in the Haystack: Querying Physical AI Data with Daft
abstract: Queryi is a sophisticated AI tool designed to efficiently extract relevant information from vast datasets, making it an indispensable asset for researchers, analysts, and data scientists seeking to find needle-in-the-haystack insights.
abstract_zh: 哥们儿，听说过Queryi吗？这货简直就是科研、分析和数据科学界的宝藏利器！它能把那些庞大的数据集里的有用信息拎出来，就像在草堆里找针一样轻松。简直是研究者们的得力助手，没它还真不行呢！
